newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9; next earnings is scheduled Aug 26, 2026. The standing story (FY26 KRW4.4T revenue / ~$4.22B new-order guide, US Alabama plant expansion +50% UHV capacity) is unchanged from earlier in the year.

verdicts.rankRationale: No new fundamental evidence since June 9; flat price move. On a hidden-alpha list this remains a widely-covered 'emperor stock' grid/AI-power trade, the opposite of under-owned, and its distance from the passives-bottleneck stack is unchanged. Correctly penalized at rank 51; hold.
verdicts.bull: Grid-transformer bottleneck for AI datacenter power; strong order backlog; US capacity expansion.
verdicts.neutral: Real exposure but over-covered and farther from the passives core; rank reflects that.
verdicts.bear: Consensus AI-power trade, fully discovered; quiet until Aug 26 earnings.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded, far from passives stack; no near-term catalyst
